entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A nutrient dense, resilient cereal crop promoted to diversify diets and combat iron and zinc deficiency

entities.name: IRON AND ZINC DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A public health problem common in low-income countries

entities.name: ANEMIA
entities.description: A condition affecting 57% of school aged children in Tanzania

entities.name: ZINC INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of zinc consumed, which is inadequate for over 25% of the population

entities.name: SCHOOL AGED CHILDREN
entities.description: Children aged 5-12 years who are the target for increased pearl millet consumption

entities.name: KONGWA DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Tanzania where the study was conducted

entities.name: DODOMA REGION
entities.description: The region in Tanzania where the study was conducted

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where the study took place

entities.name: CROSS-SECTIONAL STUDY
entities.description: The research design used to investigate drivers of food choice

entities.name: STUDY QUESTIONNAIRE
entities.description: A tool consisting of 66 items used to collect data from respondents

entities.name: CORRELATIONS
entities.description: Statistical method used to measure association between constructs

entities.name: MULTIPLE LINEAR REGRESSIONS
entities.description: Statistical method used to identify predictive constructs

entities.name: MANN-WHITNEY U TEST
entities.description: Statistical test used for score comparison

entities.name: INTENTION
entities.description: The level of intent of caregivers to feed their children pearl millet

entities.name: BEHAVIOR
entities.description: The actual act of feeding school going children with pearl millet

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Awareness of the nutritional benefits of pearl millet

entities.name: BEHAVIOR IDENTITY
entities.description: A construct correlated with knowledge

entities.name: HEALTH BEHAVIOR IDENTITY
entities.description: A construct correlated with intention

entities.name: NUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: A characteristic of pearl millet

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: A characteristic of pearl millet
